name: drugdata_categorical_201708
title: Drug Cultivation Sites
description: The drug cultivation dataset contains information on coca bush, opium poppy, and cannabis cultivation through the world.
details: Dataset downloaded August 2017. This is a categorical raster dataset indicating drug type covering each pixel.

processing_options.description: Drug type. Note: 'mix' is an additional category for cells that contain more than one drug type.
total count of pixels per unit of analysis

variable_description: drug category (cannabis, coca bush, opium, mix)
citation: Buhaug, Halvard & Päivi Lujala 2005. Accounting for Scale: Measuring Geography in Quantitative Studies of Civil War. Political Geography 24: 399-418.
